description: The world's first functional PlayStation Vita emulator.
vita3k_description: Vita3K is the world's first functional experimental open-source PlayStation Vita emulator for Windows, Linux, macOS and Android.
legal_notice: Please note that the purpose of the emulator is not to enable illegal activity.
get_in_touch_description: Get in touch with the developers and other users whenever you want. We prefer via our Discord server, but the choice is up to you!
the_emulator_can_run_some_commercial_gam: The emulator can run some commercial games!
several_homebrew_games_are_also_supporte: Several homebrew games are also supported. Check the homebrew compatibility list for further details.
trademarks_notice: PlayStation and PS Vita are trademarks of Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc.
emulator_notice: The emulator is not related to or endorsed by Sony, or derived from confidential materials belonging to Sony.
contribute_ways: You can contribute to the emulator in the following ways:
ko_fi_page: If you would like to show your appreciation and even help fund development, the project has a Ko-fi Page.
file_issues_or_make_pull_requests: File issues or make Pull Requests on our GitHub repository.
blog_description: We have a blog where we irregularly publish detailed reports with the latest progress in our work. Come to read what's new!
homebrew_that_work_with_bugs_or_glitches: Homebrew that work with bugs or glitches.
homebrew_that_work_but_have_very_poor_fr: Homebrew that work but have very poor framerate.
playstation_trademarks: PlayStation and PS Vita are trademarks of Sony Interactive Entertainment Inc.
the_emulator_is_not_related_to_sony: The emulator is not related to or endorsed by Sony, or derived from confidential materials belonging to Sony.
nothing_desc: Games that don't boot at all, not displaying an initial black screen with a FPS counter.
bootable_desc: Games that boot but display nothing more than a black screen with a FPS counter.
intro_desc: Games that display any image on screen but doesn't reach to menus.
menu_desc: Games that get into menu but can't enter Ingame.
ingame_minus_desc: Games that go ingame but have major issues that prevents it from going further early on.
ingame_plus_desc: Games that go far ingame but have glitches that render the game unplayable or have non-playable performance.
playable_desc: Games that can be played from start to finish with playable performance and no game breaking glitches.
emulator_undergoing_changes:
The emulator is currently undergoing great changes of its backend which are greatly improving compatibility with games.
This compatibility list doesn't reflect the state of the emulator anymore and everyone interested in the emulator is
encouraged to re-test their games with the latest emulator builds every few weeks to update the compatibility reports.
